info.title: FeatureScript Standard Library - Features-SheetMetal
info.description: Sheet metal features — start, flange, bend, corner, tab, joint, loft, formed

sheetMetalAttribute.fs.name: sheetMetalAttribute
sheetMetalAttribute.fs.description: Modules prefixed with "sheetMetal" here and below control functionality related to working with sheet metal models in Onshape.Sheet metal models are created with the `sheetMetalStart` feature. The geometry of these models is not modifiable with ordinary geometry operations, and an operation which attempts to modify a sheet metal model will always throw the error `ErrorStringEnum.SHEET_METAL_PARTS_PROHIBITED`Onshape's sheet metal operations are instead encapsulated in features defined with `defineSheetMetalFeature`. These features directly modify the underlying sheet metal master body, a hidden surface body not accessible from other features. The master body (along with `SMAttribute`s set on its entities) provides the information necessary for `updateSheetMetalGeometry` to build both sheet metal bodies: the 3D folded body and the flat pattern. The result is simultaneous sheet metal editing, where geometry and errors are always available to the end user on both the folded and the flat sheet metal models.Most custom features will function only on bodies which are not active sheet metal, because the feature's effects are not readily translatable from the folded model back to the flattened master model. A custom feature's user will typically discover this when an operation within the custom feature throws a `SHEET_METAL_PARTS_PROHIBITED` error, giving the user-facing message "Active sheet metal models are not allowed."Additionally, a custom feature's query parameter can disallow selection of entities from sheet metal bodies using the ActiveSheetMetal.NO filter. Any other query can be filtered for non-sheet-metal geometry using `separateSheetMetalQueries`.

symbols.name: SMAttribute
symbols.description: Sheet metal object definition attribute type.

symbols.name: canBeSMAttribute
symbols.signature: (value)

symbols.name: smAttributeDefault
symbols.description: Empty map as SMAttribute convenient for attribute lookup

symbols.name: asSMAttribute
symbols.signature: (value is map)
symbols.description: Attach SMAttribute type to a map. convenient for attribute lookup and queries.

symbols.name: makeSMJointAttribute
symbols.signature: (attributeId is string)
symbols.description: Start SMAttribute for joint.

symbols.name: makeSMWallAttribute
symbols.signature: (attributeId is string)

symbols.name: makeSMCornerAttribute
symbols.signature: (attributeId is string)
symbols.description: Start SMAttribute for corner.

symbols.name: getSmObjectTypeAttributes
symbols.signature: (context is Context, topology is Query, objectType is SMObjectType)
symbols.description: Get attributes with matching objectType.

symbols.name: clearSmAttributes
symbols.signature: (context is Context, entities is Query)
symbols.description: Clear SM attributes from entities.

symbols.name: hasSheetMetalAttribute
symbols.signature: (context is Context, entities is Query, objectType is SMObjectType)
symbols.description: Check for presence of SMAttribute types.

symbols.name: replaceSMAttribute
symbols.signature: (context is Context, existingAttribute is SMAttribute, newAttribute is SMAttribute)
symbols.description: For all entities annotated with attribute matching existingAttribute pattern, replace it with newAttribute. Return query for entities whose attributes have been modified.

symbols.name: getSMDefinitionEntities
symbols.signature: (context is Context, selection is Query)
symbols.description: Find sheet metal master body entities corresponding to feature input.

symbols.name: getSMDefinitionEntities
symbols.signature: (context is Context, selection is Query, entityType is EntityType)

symbols.name: isSheetMetalModelActive
symbols.signature: (context is Context, sheetMetalModel is Query)
symbols.description: Check if sheet metal model is active.

symbols.name: areEntitiesFromSingleSheetMetalModel
symbols.signature: (context is Context, entities is Query)
symbols.description: Check if all entities belong to the same sheet metal model

symbols.name: areEntitiesFromSingleActiveSheetMetalModel
symbols.signature: (context is Context, entities is Query)
symbols.description: Check if all entities belong to the same active sheet metal model

symbols.name: getWallAttribute
symbols.signature: (context is Context, wallFace is Query)
symbols.description: Get wall attribute on a single entity

symbols.name: getJointAttribute
symbols.signature: (context is Context, jointEdge is Query)
symbols.description: Get joint attribute on a single entity

symbols.name: getCornerAttribute
symbols.signature: (context is Context, cornerVertex is Query)
symbols.description: Get corner attribute on a single entity

symbols.name: SMAssociationAttribute
symbols.description: Used by sheet metal features to maintain correspondence between master sheet body entities and folded and flat solid body entities.

symbols.name: canBeSMAssociationAttribute
symbols.signature: (value)
symbols.description: Association attribute stores `attributeId`. The association is established by assigning the same attribute to associated entities. Every entity in sheet metal master sheet body has a distinct association attribute.

symbols.name: makeSMAssociationAttribute
symbols.signature: (attributeId is string)
symbols.description: Create an association attribute with the given `attributeId`.

symbols.name: assignSMAssociationAttributes
symbols.signature: (context is Context, entities is Query)
symbols.description: Assign new association attributes to entities using their transient queries to generate attribute ids.

symbols.name: smAssociationAttributePattern
symbols.description: An attribute pattern for finding attributes which are `SMAssociationAttribute`s.

symbols.name: getSMAssociationAttributes
symbols.signature: (context is Context, entities is Query)
symbols.description: Get all of the association attributes for a given set of `entities`.

symbols.name: SMCornerBreak
symbols.description: Information corresponding to a single sheet metal corner break (fillet or chamfer)

symbols.name: canBeSMCornerBreak
symbols.signature: (value)
symbols.description: Corner break must hold the break style, the range (radius and distance of fillet and chamfer respectively), and the wallId of the wall that owns the corner.

symbols.name: makeSMCornerBreak
symbols.signature: (cornerBreakStyle is SMCornerBreakStyle, range is ValueWithUnits, wallId is string)
symbols.description: Create a corner break

symbols.name: addCornerBreakToSMAttribute
symbols.signature: (attribute is SMAttribute, cornerBreakMap is map)
symbols.description: Adds an SMCornerBreak and any additional information to an SMAttribute, initializing the cornerBreaks array if necessary.

symbols.name: findCornerBreak
symbols.signature: (attribute is SMAttribute, wallId is string)
symbols.description: Finds an SMCornerBreak in attribute corresponding to wallId, returns undefined if nothing found

symbols.name: updateCornerAttribute
symbols.signature: (context is Context, vertex is Query, attribute is SMAttribute)
symbols.description: Clears existing SMAttribute, sets new one only if non-trivial

symbols.name: sanitizeControllingInformation
symbols.signature: (context is Context, attribute is SMAttribute, replaceExisting is boolean)
symbols.description:
Removes all controllingFeatureId and parameterIdInFeature information from an SMAttribute. Replaces the provided attribute with sanitized attribute if `replaceExisting` is true. Return the sanitized attribute
Fail if the attribute is a model attribute as a safety precaution, as removing the controllingFeatureId information from a model attribute would invalidate it from being the same model attribute as it was before

symbols.name: BendAlignment
symbols.description: Values specifying the alignment of sheet metal after it is bent, relative to the line

symbols.name: BendAngleControlType
symbols.description: Angle types for the bend

symbols.name: sheetMetalBend
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Bend a sheet metal model along a reference line, with additional bend control options.

symbols.name: sheetMetalBendRelief
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Bend relief feature is used to override default bend relief of sheet metal model at individual bend end.

symbols.name: sheetMetalCorner
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Corner feature is used to override default sheet metal model corner relief style or dimensions for an individual corner

symbols.name: EdgeBlendType
symbols.description: Specifies type of edge blend

symbols.name: sheetMetalCornerBreak
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Sheet metal specific feature combining functionality of edge fillet and chamfer. It calls `SMEdgeBlendImpl` to apply fillets or chamfers in flat and then change the definition surface accordingly As a result of this change rips corner/bend reliefs are also "baked" into the definition surface and flexibility of sheet metal model is lost. For this reason we recommend that this feature is used after sheet metal flanges, joints and reliefs are finalized.

symbols.name: sheetMetalEnd
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Deactivate the sheet metal model of selected parts. Continued modeling on deactivated sheet metal parts will not be represented in the flat pattern or the table.

symbols.name: SMFlangeAlignment
symbols.description:
Describes the position of a virtual sharp with respect to "flange face", defined as the face that corresponds to the edge selected for flange in the underlying sheet.
For Middle alignment, the virtual sharp at the intersection of the existing sheet and the sheet that corresponds to the flange wall, lies in the middle of the flange face.
For Inner alignment, the virtual sharp at the intersection of the planes defined by the faces of the solid to the interior of the bend, lies coincident with the edge of the flange face closest to the bend.
For Outer alignment, the virtual sharp at the intersection of the planes defined by the faces of the solid to the exterior of the bend, lies coincident with the edge of the flange face farthest from the bend.

symbols.name: SMPartialFlangeChainType
symbols.description: Sets the handling for chains of edges while creating a partial flange.

values.name: PER_EDGE
values.description: The partial flange conditions will be applied to the ends of each individual edge.

values.name: PER_CHAIN
values.description: The partial flange conditions will be applied to the ends of each chain of selected edges.

symbols.name: sheetMetalFlange
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Create sheet metal flanges on selected edges of sheet metal parts. Length of flange may be defined by distance (as measured from the virtual sharp along outer edge of wall) or limiting entity. Bend angle may be flipped using the oppositeDirection flag. When auto-miter is not selected, flange sides are rotated by miter angle.

symbols.name: sheetMetalFormed
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Creates forms of specified dimensions and style, based either on standard forms, or by user-defined forms. Each form's position and orientation are specified using sketch points or mate connectors. For sketch points sketch coordinate system specifies orientation.

symbols.name: SMFlatOp
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Adds or removes material of sheet metal part as specified by faces attached to its its flat pattern Is the implementation of sheet metal extrude in flat.

subfields.name: faces
subfields.description: Faces associated with sheet metal flat, typically sketch faces or region of sketch in flat

symbols.name: SMEdgeBlendImpl
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Applies a requested feature in sheet metal flat, changes definition surfaces to reflect this and updates sheet metal geometry Used by fillet and chamfer

subfields.name: entities
subfields.description: Sheet metal edges or vertices (flat selections are allowed) associated with vertices in definition

subfields.name: chamferType
subfields.description: Required if `crossSection` is `CHAMFER`

subfields.name: width
subfields.description: Required if `chamferType` is `EQUAL_OFFSETS` or `OFFSET_ANGLE`.

subfields.name: width1
subfields.description: Required if `chamferType` is `TWO_OFFSETS`.

subfields.name: width2
subfields.description: Required if `chamferType` is `TWO_OFFSETS`.

subfields.name: angle
subfields.description: Required if `chamferType` is `OFFSET_ANGLE`.

subfields.name: oppositeDirection
subfields.description: Optional

subfields.name: radius
subfields.requiredIf: crossSection is CIRCULAR or CONIC or CURVATURE.
subfields.description: Required if `crossSection` is `CIRCULAR` or `CONIC` or `CURVATURE`.

subfields.name: isAsymmetric
subfields.description: Optional

subfields.name: flipAsymmetric
subfields.description: Optional

subfields.name: otherRadius
subfields.description: Required if `isAsymmetric` is true.

subfields.name: rho
subfields.description: Required if `crossSection` is `CONIC`.

subfields.name: magnitude
subfields.description: Required if `crossSection` is `CURVATURE`.

symbols.name: sheetMetalJoint
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: sheetMetalJoint feature modifies sheet metal joint by changing its attribute.

symbols.name: sheetMetalLoft
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Create or add to existing sheet metal parts by selecting two profiles to loft. Adjust chordal tolerance to change loft resolution. Rips are automatically added to closed profiles. Operations on sheet metal models are automatically represented as a flat pattern, and joints and bends are listed in a table.

symbols.name: MakeJointType
symbols.description: MakeJointType is a subset of SMJointType to restrict options visible in sheetMetalMakeJoint

symbols.name: sheetMetalMakeJoint
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Produces a sheet metal joint of type RIP or BEND by extending or trimming walls of selected edges. Rip is created as an edge joint by default.

symbols.name: SMProcessType
symbols.description: Method of initializing sheet metal model

symbols.name: SMCornerStrategyType
symbols.description: Default corner relief style setting

symbols.name: SMBendStrategyType
symbols.description: Default bend relief style setting

symbols.name: SMBendCalculationType
symbols.description: Bend calculation setting

symbols.name: CORNER_RELIEF_SCALE_BOUNDS
symbols.description: Corner relief scale bounds

symbols.name: BEND_RELIEF_DEPTH_SCALE_BOUNDS
symbols.description: Bend relief depth scale bounds

symbols.name: BEND_RELIEF_WIDTH_SCALE_BOUNDS
symbols.description: Bend relief width scale bounds

symbols.name: FLIP_DIRECTION_UP_MANIPULATOR_NAME
symbols.description: Manipulator name for the "flip direction up" manipulator

symbols.name: sheetMetalModelParameters
symbols.signature: (definition is map)
symbols.description: A predicate containing the parameters required to define all parameters for a sheet metal model.

symbols.name: sheetMetalStart
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Create and activate a sheet metal model by converting existing parts, extruding sketch curves or thickening. All operations on an active sheet metal model will automatically be represented in the flat pattern and the table. Sheet metal models may consist of multiple parts. Multiple sheet metal models can be active.

symbols.name: convertExistingPart
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Convert an existing body into a sheet metal part. Definition should include all parameters from `sheetMetalModelParameters`.

subfields.name: partToConvert
subfields.description: The body to convert.

subfields.name: facesToExclude
subfields.description: Input faces to exclude from the sheet metal model.

subfields.name: bendEdges
subfields.description: Edges to represent as bends in the sheet metal model. All other nonlaminar edges will be converted to rips.

subfields.name: clearance
subfields.description: Clearance from input.

subfields.name: bendsIncluded
subfields.description: If `true`, bends will be included in clearance calculations.

symbols.name: sheetMetalTab
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Feature adding tabs to parallel sheet metal faces.

symbols.name: defineSheetMetalFeature
symbols.signature: (feature is function, defaults is map)
symbols.description: Exposes sheet metal definition sheet body to the queries within feature.

symbols.name: updateSheetMetalGeometry
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, args is map)
symbols.description: Based on current state of sheet metal definition sheet body update solid bodies

subfields.name: entities
subfields.description: sheet metal definition entities changed (or attributes changed) in this feature

subfields.name: deletedAttributes
subfields.description: associated attributes of deleted sheet metal definition entities

subfields.name: associatedChanges
subfields.description: sheet metal definition entities representing the change of this feature

symbols.name: SMThicknessDirection
symbols.description: Direction of material from definition body. For old models (before V629_SM_MODEL_FRONT_N_BACK) It is BOTH, for new models FRONT/BACK depends on oppositeDirection in sheetMetalStart

symbols.name: setCylindricalBendAttribute
symbols.signature: (context is Context, face is Query, frontThickness is ValueWithUnits, backThickness is ValueWithUnits, attributeId is string)
symbols.description: Set a bend attribute on a cylindrical face

parameters.name: face
parameters.description: face to set bend attribute on

symbols.name: annotateSmSurfaceBodies
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, args is map, objectCount is number)
symbols.description: Assign SMAttributes to topology of sheet metal definition sheet body

subfields.name: specialRadiiBends
subfields.description: array of pairs "(edge, bendRadius)"

subfields.name: defaultRadius
subfields.description: bend radius to be applied to edges in bendEdgesAndFaces

symbols.name: K_FACTOR_BOUNDS
symbols.description: A `RealBoundSpec` for sheet metal K-factor between 0. and 1., defaulting to `.45`.

symbols.name: ROLLED_K_FACTOR_BOUNDS
symbols.description: A `RealBoundSpec` for rolled sheet metal K-factor between 0. and 1., defaulting to `.5`.

symbols.name: SM_MINIMAL_CLEARANCE_BOUNDS
symbols.description: A `LengthBoundSpec` for minimal clearance of sheet metal rips

symbols.name: SM_BEND_RADIUS_BOUNDS
symbols.description: A `LengthBoundSpec` for bend radius in sheet metal features

symbols.name: SM_THICKNESS_BOUNDS
symbols.description: A `LengthBoundSpec` for thickness in sheet metal features. default to `(1/16)"` (i.e. steel)

symbols.name: SM_RELIEF_SIZE_BOUNDS
symbols.description: A `LengthBoundSpec` for relief size, corners or bend relief, in sheet metal features.

symbols.name: partitionSheetMetalParts
symbols.signature: (context is Context, allParts is Query)
symbols.description:
Partitions allParts into non-sheet metal parts and sheet metal parts. To preserve existing behavior of code the returned non-sm query is exactly the same as what is passed in for non-sm cases and a query is returned for them. The sheet metal results will usually be iterated through and so are returned as a map with the keys being the sheet metal ID and the values being the parts associated with that model.
 See also: `separateSheetMetalQueries`

symbols.name: getActiveSheetMetalId
symbols.signature: (context is Context, query is Query)
symbols.description: Get the first id of active sheet metal model the entities of query belong to.

symbols.name: getModelParameters
symbols.signature: (context is Context, model is Query)
symbols.description: Extract sheet metal model parameters in a convenient form

symbols.name: separateSheetMetalQueries
symbols.signature: (context is Context, targets is Query)
symbols.description:
Separates queries which are part of an active sheet metal model (either in the folded model or the flat pattern). 
 See also: `partitionSheetMetalParts`

subfields.name: sheetMetalQueries
subfields.description: `targets` which are part of an active sheet metal model

subfields.name: nonSheetMetalQueries
subfields.description: `targets` which are not part of an active sheet metal model

symbols.name: sheetMetalExtendSheetBodyCall
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Wrapper around opExtendSheetBody used in sheet metal operations to handle remapping of cornerBreak data

symbols.name: sheetMetalEdgeChangeCall
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, edges is Query, definition is map)
symbols.description: Wrapper around opEdgeChange used in sheet metal operations to handle remapping of cornerBreak data

symbols.name: getOwnerSMModel
symbols.signature: (context is Context, selection is Query)
symbols.description: Returns an array of sm models associated with selection in a way that works outside of sheet metal features.

symbols.name: getSMCorrespondingInPart
symbols.signature: (context is Context, selection is Query, entityType is EntityType)
symbols.description: Returns a query for all sheet metal part entities of entityType related to the input sheet metal model entities.

symbols.name: collectCornerBreakTracking
symbols.signature: (context is Context, bodies is Query)
symbols.description:
Collect information before adding material which may merge sheet metal walls. The map returned by this function should be passed directly into `remapCornerBreaks` after making the desired geometry changes.
Only walls which have broken corners are tracked.

subfields.name: wallIdToPersistentWall
subfields.description: a map from wall id to a tracked query for the wall

subfields.name: wallIdToVerticesWithBreaks
subfields.description: a map from wall id to an array of tracked vertices which break the wall

symbols.name: remapCornerBreaks
symbols.signature: (context is Context, cornerBreakTracking is map)
symbols.description: Remap corner breaks on walls whose wall id has changed. Takes the output of `collectCornerBreakTracking` as `cornerBreakTracking`.

symbols.name: getSelectionsForSMDefinitionEntities
symbols.signature: (context is Context, definitionEntities is Query, originalSelections is Query)
symbols.description: Map a group of sheet metal definition entities back to the original entities selected by the user.

symbols.name: separateByModelVersion
symbols.signature: (context is Context, targets is Query, version is FeatureScriptVersionNumber)
symbols.description:
Separates queries which are part of an active sheet metal model (either in the folded model or the flat pattern) with additional separation of active sheet metal queries based on feature script version of the corresponding sheet metal model. 
 See also: `separateSheetMetalQueries`

subfields.name: sheetMetalQueries
subfields.description: `targets` which are part of an active sheet metal model

subfields.name: nonSheetMetalQueries
subfields.description: `targets` which are not part of an active sheet metal model

subfields.name: legacyModelQueries
subfields.description: `targets` which are part of an active sheet metal model with fsVersion earlier than `version`

subfields.name: newModelQueries
subfields.description: `targets` which are part of an active sheet metal model with fsVersion equal or later than `version`

symbols.name: prepareInitialArcSketch
symbols.signature: (wrapAroundFront is boolean, modelParameters is map, innerRadius is ValueWithUnits, angle is ValueWithUnits)
symbols.description: Prepare to sketch the initial arc of the hem or flange, starting at the selected edge and wrapping either around the front of the back of the sheet. Returns information about arc ids and arc end position.

symbols.name: getDefaultBendReliefWidth
symbols.signature: (context is Context, model is Query)
symbols.description: Returns the width of a default bend relief for a sheet metal model. In the case of a tear, returns the minimal clearance.
